summary: A recorded local 7News segment, posted by ICE, marked as a news exclusive. A male reporter in a gray suit stands for a live outdoor stand-up at night in front of a building with metal barricades, then b-roll shows a crowd of people gathered around a gray van on a daytime street. A lower-third chyron reads 'ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION CRACKDOWN IN DC / CAPITOL HILL' beside a red 'FEDERAL TAKEOVER' box and a 'NEWS EXCLUSIVE' label. The narration reports on ICE enforcement in Washington and intelligence-driven targeting. The audio is broadcast reporting speech.

script.scene: A male reporter in a gray suit does a live night stand-up in front of a building with metal barricades; chyron 'ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION CRACKDOWN IN DC / CAPITOL HILL'; 'FEDERAL TAKEOVER' box; LIVE marker.
Daytime b-roll of a crowd of people gathered around a gray van on a street; same chyron and 'FEDERAL TAKEOVER' box.

notable_text: ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION CRACKDOWN IN DC; CAPITOL HILL; FEDERAL TAKEOVER; NEWS EXCLUSIVE; LIVE
